name: FUJI SUSHI AND SAKE BAR 478 INC

violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Containers of fortune cookies were on the floor.
Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Crab Rangoon in upright freezer needs to be covered.

Food-contact surfaces - Design and construction. — --Multiuse food-contact surfaces did not meet design and/or construction requirements. -Scoops for rice need to have a handle. Do not use plastic cups.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Box of ingle use food container was stored on floor. Store up off of floor.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Floor tiles are in poor condition in kitchen.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors in kitchen need more thorough cleaning.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. -Spray bottle in kitchen with yellow liquid was not labeled.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
